objective: Enable visual verification option for browser automation and continue staged live-environment validation.
non_goals: multi-forum runtime implementation beyond ppomppu adapter

completed: Added BROWSER_HEADLESS runtime toggle and wired it through env parsing
Updated env schema and runtime contract validation to include BROWSER_HEADLESS
Added explicit board preflight diagnostics and fail-fast errors for 403 and write-entry availability
Confirmed staged live checks are currently blocked by BOARD_ACCESS_DENIED (403)
Confirmed headed launch path works in code but requires display server in this runtime
gaps: Current execution runtime has no X server / DISPLAY, so headed visual browser cannot launch
Live board access currently returns 403 in this environment
Uncommitted local changes exist from diagnostics + headless toggle updates

acceptance_criteria: Observer and publisher can run with BROWSER_HEADLESS=false in a display-capable runtime
Staged checklist clearly distinguishes 403/WAF block vs login/session gap vs selector drift
Runtime contracts remain schema-valid with the new browser-mode env toggle

implementation_plan.name: Run visual smoke in display-capable runtime
actions: Launch with BROWSER_HEADLESS=false where DISPLAY is available
Verify board navigation and write-entry visibility manually

implementation_plan.name: Package checkpoint
actions: Publish updated evidence in next handover

practical_recommendations: Use session boundaries when external blockers appear (403/WAF, missing DISPLAY, credentials/session requirements)
Cut handover every 45-90 minutes or after any milestone that changes runtime behavior
Always checkpoint before switching runtime context (headless <-> headed, local <-> remote)
Treat unresolved environment blockers as explicit stop points and hand over with evidence
completed_items: Preflight diagnostics for board access and write-entry detection
Live-check execution evidence captured for current environment
pending_items: Visual headed run in GUI-capable runtime
Resolve 403 access path for live board in this environment

decisions.title: Add explicit board preflight diagnostics before selector actions
decisions.rationale: Reduces ambiguity between permission/session problems and automation selector regressions

decisions.title: Use BROWSER_HEADLESS as runtime-controlled execution mode
decisions.rationale: Supports visual verification workflows without hardcoding headed mode into production paths

constraints: Do not weaken safety guards before enabling live publish
Maintain strict env and contract validation at startup
Preserve compatibility with current Express + React + Playwright stack
next_actions: Run headed smoke check in runtime with DISPLAY or xvfb-run
Re-run staged checklist and capture evidence
